title: P5424 RNA-seq tutorial  datasets
author: Denis Puthier
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A set of RNA-seq datasets obtained from P5424 cell line stimulated or not with PMA  and Ionomycin. Reads are limited to those that map on chr18 (20M to 50M).
steps_raw: A set of RNA-seq datasets obtained from P5424 cell line stimulated or not with PMA  and Ionomycin. Reads are limited to those that map on chr18 (20M to 50M).
